treaties.name: JCPOA — Iran Nuclear Deal
treaties.notes: US withdrew unilaterally May 2018. Iran began exceeding limits in 2019. Indirect talks have stalled.

treaties.name: Israel–Hezbollah Ceasefire (Nov 2024)
treaties.notes: 60-day initial period with phased IDF withdrawal. Both sides report intermittent violations; broader picture stays largely in force.

treaties.name: Iran–Saudi Diplomatic Restoration
treaties.notes: Beijing-brokered rapprochement; embassies reopened. Tensions persist over proxy conflicts.

treaties.name: Israel–UAE Abraham Accords
treaties.notes: Normalization holds but Gaza war has cooled engagement; Saudi accession deferred indefinitely.

treaties.name: Yemen Truce (UN-mediated)
treaties.notes: Formal 6-month truce lapsed Oct 2022. De facto pause held until Red Sea Houthi campaign restarted late 2023.

treaties.name: Houthi Red Sea Ceasefire (US-Oman)
treaties.notes: US-Houthi de-escalation excluded Israel-bound vessels; Houthi missile strikes on Israel continued.

treaties.name: Iran–Iraq Border Security Agreement
treaties.notes: Bilateral agreement on Kurdish armed groups along Iran-Iraq border; cooperation deepens.

treaties.name: Egypt–Israel Peace Treaty
treaties.notes: Longest-standing Arab-Israeli treaty; under significant strain from Gaza war but holding.

treaties.name: Jordan–Israel Peace Treaty
treaties.notes: Diplomatic ties strained over Gaza; ambassador recalls have occurred but treaty intact.

Trump on "the reflecting pond" -- "We did a beautiful job. It's like a piece of glass. And for some reason this disturbed the radical left lunatics."
Trump: "We should be in my opinion at $2.25 right now at the pump. And we're higher than that. We are doing a big investigation on it."
Q: Will the fencing around the reflecting pool be down by July 4? TRUMP: Ready? Thugs
Trump on Mamdani: "He's a charming guy, good looking guy"
Trump: "Schumer has lost his way. He's become, essentially, a Palestinian. I've asked for a beautiful silk outfit to be sent in the Palestinian traditional. Chuck Schumer is Jewish."

Trump to a British reporter: "You have the greatest oil field in the world, one of them. It's called the North Sea oil. All you have to do is bid it out to Exxon, Chevron, Shell, British Petroleum. They're begging to go there."
Q: Would you want to be the first person on the new UK prime minister's list to visit London? TRUMP: No. He's very liberal

Q: Will you veto the housing bill? TRUMP: Look, I made billions of dollars with housing. I know housing better than anybody maybe anywhere. It's all about the interest rate. I don't want to hurt people that own houses too.
Trump: "I asked the US attorney to go look at their votes, and as soon as I did that, they announced that Steve Hilton would be a finalist. We have rigged elections."
Trump on the bombing of the girls' school in Iran: "I don't think it was us" (Every credible report has concluded the US was responsible)

Q: Have you seen the report into the Iran girls' school attack? TRUMP: I have not seen it Q: Why not? TRUMP: I have to wait for it to be completed. I don't know they're ever gonna solve that problem. You could ask Pete. Maybe it wasn't our missile.
Q: You like winners. Do you think President Zelenskyy is winning right now? TRUMP: He's doing pretty well. Look, you have to say he's courageous. He's got fighters.
Q: What do you the allies to do more than what they are doing right now? TRUMP: I just want their loyalty. Just give us a little kiss. We don't want much. They say, 'No, we can't do it.'
